description: High hint noise, continuous arrivals, and fewer steps than total tickets so the agent must triage for impact.

initial_tickets.description: EU customers cannot complete checkout because the payment step spins forever for every order.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Checkout outage is a critical technical incident even though the symptom appears in billing.

initial_tickets.description: We canceled last month but still got charged again on this morning's renewal.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Wrongful renewal charge is urgent enough to prioritize and can be corrected directly by billing.

initial_tickets.description: Procurement asked for your certificate of insurance before they can finish vendor review.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Administrative request with a misleading technical hint.

initial_tickets.description: SSO login has failed for every new employee since this morning. Existing users can still sign in.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Organization-wide onboarding blocker requires urgent technical escalation.

initial_tickets.description: My invoice total changed, maybe because of taxes, but I am not sure which invoice is wrong.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Billing owns the issue, but the ticket lacks enough identifying detail to resolve.

initial_tickets.description: The desktop app crashes every time I open the analytics tab after the latest update.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Product defect needs technical handling but is not as urgent as an outage.

initial_tickets.description: Where do I export audit logs for our compliance review?
We removed 30 seats yesterday and need the prorated credit reflected on the next invoice.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Standard proration adjustment with enough information for billing to handle.

initial_tickets.description: The payment succeeded in our bank app, but the subscription still shows suspended and our workspace is locked.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Payment-account state mismatch is blocking service and should be treated as urgent billing work.

initial_tickets.description: The site feels slow for one teammate in Tokyo only, but I do not have browser or network details yet.
initial_tickets.ground_truth_reason: Likely technical, but more diagnostics are required before triage can proceed.

tickets.description: Webhook retries spiked to 100 percent failures right after our deploy and downstream orders are stuck.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Production integration outage with business impact is critical.

tickets.description: Can I change the invoice recipient email to our accounts payable inbox?
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Simple account administration request that does not need billing investigation.

tickets.description: We were charged twice on the annual renewal for workspace Northwind.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Duplicate charge is a billing issue with enough detail to correct directly.

tickets.description: The Android app shows a blank screen after login for multiple users in our field team.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Multi-user mobile app failure needs technical escalation.

tickets.description: Your API is suddenly throttling our paid traffic below the contract limit and checkout calls are timing out.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Contract-impacting API degradation is a critical technical incident.

tickets.description: Procurement needs your W-9 today so we can finish vendor setup.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Tax document request is low urgency and best routed through billing or finance operations.

tickets.description: How do I hide archived projects from the default project view?
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Simple navigation question with an incorrect technical hint.

tickets.description: My refund never came through, but I do not remember the invoice number or the card used.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Billing owns refunds, but the case lacks enough information to action.

tickets.description: Every CSV export in the admin dashboard is failing with a 500 error right now.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Repeatable server-side failure is technical and urgent.

tickets.description: Email notifications stopped for everyone in our organization after we changed branding settings.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Org-wide notification failure has clear technical ownership and strong urgency.

tickets.description: Legal needs a copy of our signed DPA for this renewal review.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Administrative document request, not a technical issue.

tickets.description: We need next month's invoice split by cost center before finance closes the books.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Complex invoice reconfiguration belongs to billing and likely needs specialized handling.

tickets.description: Password reset emails are not arriving for multiple admins, so they cannot regain access.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Multi-user account recovery failure is a technical escalation.

tickets.description: Our account still says overdue even though the ACH payment cleared yesterday.
tickets.ground_truth_reason: Payment status mismatch is blocking billing state and should be handled urgently.
